codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3010'
path = '/clients'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.get(
    url,
    headers={
        'x-api-key': 'a3cad2343dc06dec39d967c1a836d426c754e7edec533be2ce5a3e8139d0a67f'
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)

💭 Run: ./example

  3010 ➡️ port
  🔤/clients🔤 ➡️ path

  💭 Connect and send
  🍺 🆕📞 host port❗ ➡️ socket
  🍺 💬 socket 📇 request❗❗
  
  💭 Read and print response
  🍺 👂 socket 4096❗ ➡️ data
  😀 🍺 🔡 data❗❗
  
  💭 Close socket
  🚪 socket❗
